textByHash.473bf512497dee3a1d96b14c5928a61bc6283d1f: You have done well brave adventurer, but I would test your mettle now. You may arrange the fight with Larxus at your leisure.
textByHash.156b16e94da6d60fe6759f36920bc686d4b4e597: Adventurer, you have defeated me in battle! For this, I congratulate you. Please accept my cape as a sign of your accomplishment.
